## Associated Tutorial

This workflows is part of the tutorial [A Docker-based interactive Jupyterlab powered by GPU for artificial intelligence in Galaxy](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/topics/statistics/tutorials/gpu_jupyter_lab/tutorial.html), available in the [GTN](https://training.galaxyproject.org)
